title: No Access
content-line1: This record does not belong to you and
content-line2: therefore you may not edit or delete the record.
content-line2-hit: therefore you may not delete the record.
content-line3: therefore you do not have right to verify this record.
content-line4: therefore you do not have right to active/inactive this record.
content-line5: therefore you do not have right to assign this record.
content-line6-setavatar: therefore you do not have right to set avatar for this record.
delete-gallery: This record does not belong to you and therefore you may not delete the record.
edit-gallery: This record does not belong to you and therefore you may not edit the record.
